creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #3)

Thank you. Since updates for those ports have not been created, we'll have this track and cover all. Could you please list, for each grafana port (except 8)

- The vulnerable version(s) string to facilitate vuxml entries
- The (minimum) fixed version
- Links to major version specific announcements and changelogs

If you can update to vuxml attachment to cover all major versions, that would be great.
